task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OpenClinica.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login (typically showing 'root' or 'Admin' in the user session area).

task_completion.description: Verify the correct study is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active study context in the OpenClinica interface (usually at the top or in a sidebar) displays 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify subject DM-105 has been restored to 'Available' (Active) status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subject Matrix or View Subject page, DM-105's status is shown as 'Available' or 'Active' (often indicated by a specific icon like a green checkmark or person icon, and no longer marked as 'Removed' or a red 'X').

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Baseline Assessment' event for DM-105 is locked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subject Matrix or event details for DM-105, the specific 'Baseline Assessment' event column/row displays a locked status (typically a padlock icon).

task_completion.description: Verify the entire subject record for DM-105 was NOT locked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The global subject status for DM-105 does not show a global lock icon; only the specific event should be locked.

task_completion.description: Verify the collateral subject DM-101 was not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: If visible in the Subject Matrix, DM-101 does not have any new lock icons or removed statuses applied; it remains in its default state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OpenClinica web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenClinica GUI. There should be no terminal windows executing psql or curl commands to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) should be visible in the screenshots used to alter the DOM text or icons.

integrity.description: Verify the agent followed a genuine sequence of UI interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show intermediate steps like viewing the removed subjects, clicking a restore button, confirming restoration, and navigating to the event to lock it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Study: DM-TRIAL-2024. Target Subject: DM-105 (initially in 'Removed' status). Target Event: 'Baseline Assessment' (initially 'Completed'). Collateral Subject: DM-101. The agent must restore DM-105 to 'Available' and lock ONLY the 'Baseline Assessment' event for DM-105. DM-105's overall record must not be locked, and DM-101 must remain untouched.
